summary: Branch Transfer Page UX Redesign - Complete Frontend Testing. Verified the new status-based card view replacing the old Incoming/Outgoing tabs. All features working correctly: status filter pills with counts, card-based transfer display with timelines, colored left borders, action buttons, View/Receive dialogs, and New Transfer form.

test_results.page_load: PASS - Branch Transfers page loads without errors with data-testid='branch-transfer-page'

status_filter_pills.all_filter: PASS - Shows 25 transfers with count badge
status_filter_pills.requests_filter: PASS - Shows stock requests with request cards
status_filter_pills.drafts_filter: PASS - Shows 4 draft transfers, correctly filtered
status_filter_pills.in_transit_filter: PASS - Shows 2 in-transit transfers with Receive buttons
status_filter_pills.needs_review_filter: PASS - Shows 2 pending review transfers with Accept/Dispute buttons, highlighted with orange styling

transfer_cards.branch_route: PASS - Branch route shown as 'Branch 1 → Branch 2'
transfer_cards.status_badge: PASS - Status badges displayed (Draft, In Transit, On Terminal, Pending Review, Cancelled)
transfer_cards.timeline: PASS - Inline timeline with Created → Sent → Checked/Terminal → Complete steps
transfer_cards.financials: PASS - Items count, transfer capital, retail value displayed
transfer_cards.colored_borders: PASS - Left border colored per status (blue for in-transit, amber for terminal, orange for pending, etc.)

action_buttons.view_button: PASS - Eye icon opens transfer detail dialog
action_buttons.print_button: PASS - Print button visible for appropriate statuses
action_buttons.edit_button: PASS - Pencil icon visible for drafts
action_buttons.send_button: PASS - Send button (blue) visible on draft transfers
action_buttons.receive_button: PASS - Receive button (green) visible on in-transit transfers
action_buttons.send_to_terminal_button: PASS - Phone icon visible for send-to-terminal
action_buttons.accept_button: PASS - Accept button visible on pending review transfers
action_buttons.dispute_button: PASS - Dispute button visible on pending review transfers
action_buttons.cancel_button: PASS - Cancel button visible on draft/sent transfers

test_results.view_dialog: PASS - Opens with order details, timeline, product table, pricing, Print buttons
test_results.receive_dialog: PASS - Opens with qty adjustment, shortage/excess banners, receipt upload, notes field
test_results.new_transfer_tab: PASS - Form displays with From/To branch selectors, Min Margin, Category Markup Rules, product table, Create Transfer Order button

verified_features: Status-based filter pills (All, Requests, Drafts, In Transit, Terminal, Needs Review, Completed, Disputes)
Filter pills show counts next to labels
Needs Review filter highlighted with orange border when count > 0
Card-based transfer display replacing old table rows
Colored left borders per status (slate for draft, blue for sent, amber for terminal, orange for pending, emerald for received, red for disputed)
Inline timeline on each card showing progress (Created → Sent → Checked → Complete)
Transfer cards show: order number, branch route, status badge, date, financials
Action buttons on cards: View, Print, Edit, Send, Receive, Send to Terminal, Accept, Dispute, Cancel
View dialog shows full transfer details with product table and pricing
Receive dialog allows qty adjustment with variance detection and receipt upload
New Transfer tab still works with product search and pricing table
critical_code_review_comments: Status filter pills implementation is clean with data-testid attributes for testing
Card layout with timeline is responsive and informative
Action buttons are conditionally rendered based on transfer status and user permissions
Needs Review highlighting implemented correctly when count > 0
seed_data_creation: Used existing transfer orders in database with various statuses (cancelled, sent, sent_to_terminal, received_pending, received, draft, disputed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branch Transfer page redesign complete. Key selectors: data-testid='branch-transfer-page', data-testid='transfer-history-tab', data-testid='filter-{status}' (all, requests, draft, in_transit, checking, pending, completed, disputes), data-testid='transfer-card-{id}', data-testid='view-btn-{id}', data-testid='send-btn-{id}', data-testid='receive-btn-{id}'. Filter pills: All=25, Drafts=4, In Transit=2, Terminal=12, Needs Review=2. Status badges use STATUS_COLORS mapping. Cards have colored left borders per status.
